query: I got a bunch of new pine seedlings and there's a lot of weeds comin' up around 'em, what's the best time to spray somethin' to kill them weeds without hurtin' my pines?
gold_answer: Spray Oust XP (sulfometuron 0.06 lb/A) in the late dormant season, soon after transplanting while seedlings are dormant; applying after bud break or leaf-out can injure them.
gold_source: soybeans recommended chemicals for weed and brush control
gold_snippet:
Application after bud break
or leaf-out may cause injury to the hardwoods.

query: I'm having trouble with stink bugs in my rice field, how many should I expect to see before I need to spray something to control them?
gold_answer: Rice stink bug threshold: 5 per 10 sweeps in weeks 1-2 after 75% heading, and 10 per 10 sweeps in weeks 3-4.
gold_source: rice 2020 br wells arkansas rice research studies
gold_snippet:
For weeks 3 and 4 after 75% heading, our threshold
is 10 RSB per 10 sweeps.

query: I sprayed my pond for weeds, but it didn't work. Could the muddy water be why it didn't kill 'em?
gold_answer: Yes - in muddy water diquat binds to the suspended particles and is rendered inactive, so it won't control the weeds.
gold_source: rice recommended chemicals for weed and brush control
gold_snippet: Diquat binds with suspended particles, rendering it inactive.

query: I'm growin' Clearfield rice, can I use Beyond Xtra without worryin' about what I plant next year?
gold_answer: A Beyond Xtra-only program (Clearfield varieties only) removes the rotation restriction, allowing conventional or Provisia/Max-Ace rice to be planted the following year.
gold_source: soybeans recommended chemicals for weed and brush control
gold_snippet: Use on Clearfield rice varieties only.

query: My rice crop's yield is sufferin' near them pigweeds, what's the best time to take care of 'em so they don't hurt my harvest?
gold_answer: Palmer amaranth (pigweed) can cut rice yield by more than 80% within 6 inches of the weed; its emergence timing relative to rice is crucial, so control it early.
gold_source: rice 2023 br wells arkansas rice research studies
gold_snippet: rice yield by more than 80% within 6 inches from the weed.

query: I got a field with some pretty dense weeds comin' up, what's the best way to get rid of 'em without hurtin' my cotton that's just startin' to grow?
gold_answer: Rate the herbicide by soil texture: 0.8 pt/A coarse, 1.6 pt/A medium, 2.4 pt/A fine soil (Linuron/Linex 4L 0.5-1.5 lb/A); apply after cotton is 15 inches tall.
gold_source: rice recommended chemicals for weed and brush control
gold_snippet:
Coarse Soil (light) - 0.8 pt/A
Medium Soil - 1.6 pt/A
Fine Soil (heavy) - 2.4 pt/A

query: I'm seein' some worms eatin' away at my rice crop, causin' some damage to the leaves and stems, how many of 'em do I need to see before I should spray somethin' to get rid of 'em?
gold_answer: Treat armyworms in rice when there are six or more per square foot; later in the season treat when fall armyworms are present and damaging the flag leaf.
gold_snippet:
Treat when six or more
armyworms per square foot.
